title: helichrysum ferrugineum
intro: Helichrysum ferrugineum, also known as the "Golden Ragwort" or "Golden Everlasting," is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and North Africa. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Helichrysum ferrugineum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
